title: doria lingua
intro: Doria lingua, also known as tongue plant or snake tongue, is a herbaceous perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of doria lingua include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Doria lingua can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
